posts.author: mondayuser99 (Monday User)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be nice to be able to export the Kanban view to an Excel spreadsheet.

Currently, users must recreate the view manually in Excel which is a tedious process that wastes time and introduces errors.

What are you trying to achieve

This would be a useful feature for creating reports and being able to manipulate the data within those reports and create things like charts.
